user.title: iCloud Find My
user.description: Sign in with your Apple ID. The Anisette server URL is used to provide the device-attestation headers Apple requires for unofficial clients. The default works for most users; you can self-host an anisette-v3 server for more control.

twofa.title: Two-factor authentication
twofa.description: Enter the 6-digit code Apple just sent to your trusted devices.

error.invalid_2fa: That verification code didn't work — try again.
error.cannot_connect: Couldn't reach Apple. Check your network and the anisette server URL.
error.unknown: Something unexpected happened. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This Apple ID is already set up.

play_sound.name: Play sound
play_sound.description: Play a sound on a Find My device.
